Lanhern Firepride.hail: Good day, traveler! You look as though you are in need of [superior armor]. We here at Firepride's specialized in armor.

Bassanio Weekin.hail: Go to the taverns if you're looking for talk.

Caleah Herblender.hail: Greetings, and welcome to my humble little shop. I sell and trade various goods for my fellow wizards of the Order of Three. My assistants, Hanlore and Drawna,

Captain Rohand.hail: Greetings, friend, and welcome to the Mermaid's Lure. Here, we sell fishing supplies and some imported goods from far-off lands. And, if you've got a few minute

Cassius Messus.hail: Hail!  What do think of [Lisera]?  She aint' much to look at, but soon she will be singing again.

Chesgard Sydwen.hail: Then I would urge you to attend daily services in the Temple of Thunder.  You are a [member of Thunder] are you not?  Or maybe I am mistaken and you are just [l

Daenor Casthopur.hail: Neclo Rheslar is an old friend of mine. Right now, he's out working in the Qeynos Hills. In fact, if you have some free time, you should go out and meet him. He

Danaria Hollin.hail: Greetings! Nice to meet someone with manners. I do not see how you people stand to live in this madhouse of ruffians. I would have left weeks ago if I were not

Den Magason.hail: Oh, hey there.. How ya doing? My name's Den. I work for ol' [Rohand] here, unloading the [shipments] that come in from overseas.

Earron Huntlan.hail: Greetings, thirsty adventurer! Please help yourself to the free salty snacks. We are here to serve you at the Lion's Main Tavern. Allow yourself to indulge from

Ebon Strongbear.hail: Welcome. I am the champion of the Steel Warriors. There are none who can challenge me. I guide this brotherhood of Steel Warriors. From Qeynos to the trade city

Edvard Tommels.hail: Oh good! I can add them to my collection. We are preparing to make books you know. Bring me any of the scrolls you find in the old Splitpaw lair, and I would be

Eve Marsinger.hail: 'I have messages that need to go to - well, right now I have one that needs to go to Highpass. Will you [deliver] mail to [Highpass] for me?

Faren.hail: Oh.. Hiya, I'm just out here fishing, since I can't find a job. I hope this [bait] I just bought catches me a big ol' fish.

Fish Ranamer.hail: Taxes?! Taxes?! Tax me right out of business is what you folks are doing! Take your taxes and get out of my pub! Unless, of course, you care to buy some drinks.

Gahna Salbeen.hail: Greetings. This is a grand city. I plan to make much profit here.

Gash Flockwalker.hail: Good day to you. Your city of stone walls is quite magnificent. Still, the glory of Surefall Glade puts this city to shame.

Gehna Solbenya.hail: If you are a young acolyte, you may [deliver blessings to the flock] and if you are a skilled cleric, we need you to [hunt bandit binders].

Gharin.hail: Good day! I see they have good stock for the future armies of Qeynos. I, myself, wish to be a soldier one day instead of doing this [job].

Ginleen Harltop.hail: Hail!  Keep all combat to the center of the ring. So says [Ebon Strongbear].

Guard Beren.hail: What do you want? Are you friends with that lousy [dwarf]?! You had better not be unless you want to spend the rest of the week bleeding!

Guard Corshin.hail: We think the bodies are washing out of the aqueducts beneath Qeynos. It is a dangerous place to go and Commander Bayle refuses to send regular patrols down ther

Guard Lasen.hail: I wish it wasn't so blasted hot, I could really use some water.

Guard Perin.hail: Hail! My name is Perin. If you had any smarts at all you would be careful who you talk to around here.

Guard Wenbie.hail: Oh, it will be easier for us both if I just show you where it is. Follow me. But be quick about it, because I have to get back to my patrol.

Hansl Bigroon.hail: Ah, yes! Traveling can be truly dangerous. Have you ever been to Erudin or do you not care for that place?

Indaria.hail: Hello, have you seen my daughter?

Joffrey Clay.hail: Greetings, friend. My name is Joffrey. I'm trying to learn to play the [flute]. I'm also working on a new song I learned while I was visiting [Kelethin].

Kasine Paegra.hail: May the blessings of the Rainkeeper protect you in your travels. I am Kasine Paegra, keeper of the [Order of Thunder] medallions.

Kazlo Naedra.hail: These blank sheets seem harder to find every month. All the local merchants are out of them. Hopefully, one of the merchants out in Surefall will have some.

Klieb Torne.hail: Heh? Why don't you mind your own business bub?! Buzz off!

Lomarc.hail: Do I know you? Don't stick your nose where it don't belong. It might just get cut off.

Marlin Bizmite.hail: Greetings, fellow fisherman. You must be a fisherman. You have the stench of one. If you are not, might I suggest this new pastime I have heard of? A bath!!

McNeal Jocub.hail: Good ta see ya! Now start showin' these poodlewalkers how a real fish drinks!

Moran Smith.hail: Greetings!!  Moran here.  I just love this city.  I traveled from Freeport to Qeynos to stay far from the [Freeport Militia].

Nindle Hogster.hail: Hello! You should take up fishing. It really relieves the stress that accompanies heavy adventuring.

Nostahla Westfend.hail: Greetings..  I am Nostahla Westfend, understudy of Gahlith, and Second Master Wizard of the Order of Three.

Rabley Trumend.hail: Buy something!!  This is no tavern!  I am not selling conversation!

Raz The Rat Misk.hail: Spare 3 gold so I can get a decent meal for once, master?

Sansa Nusk.hail: Hello..  Welcome to the Wind Spirit's Song.  I'm Sansa, and I help out the local bards here.

Solani Dayadil.hail: If you are a fellow merchant. I must warn you of the inevitable tax increase.  Antonius Bayle is soon to make a [deal] with the people of Surefall Glade.

Trumpy Irontoe.hail: <BURP!> Yeah. Gimme a.. <BURP!> er.. honey mead.

Crow.hail: Welcome to Crow's! If you're thirsty, we have a fine selection of brews and ales.

Flynn Merrington.hail: Oh look.. another gnoll pup. This bar is too rough for the likes of you. Why don't you try Fish's. We don't need any more regulars here, chump!

Gerault Takenmaul.hail: Hello.  Please feel free to browse.  We make the finest boots in all of Antonica.

Guard Buce.hail: Greetings, citizen! While I have taken an oath to protect you. that does not mean I have to waste my breath talking to you.

Hanns Krieghor.hail: My name is Hanns..  Do as I say. and we shall get along just fine.

Hurrieta Ironforge.hail: What are you doing back here?! I cannot stand it when the children allow their friends to run rampant on our estate. Please leave!

Jracol Brestiage.hail: You'd better run along, if ya know what's best for ya!

Kane Bayle.hail: Hail, citizen! I am afraid you are not allowed in this building. You will have to leave. Good day to you.

Nerissa Clothspinner.hail: I cannot discuss such things with a person as young to the world as you are.
